name: nexus
description: Full SEO/GEO content pipeline for TrueMission: SERP analysis, intent + E-E-A-T gap analysis, query fan-out + GEO structure prescription, outline with real internal link discovery, first draft, final polish with SEO pack + schema, standalone humanizer, and a conversion layer that injects site-branded CTAs and soft product upsells.

interface.shortDescription: SEO/GEO content pipeline: research to CTA-ready article
interface.longDescription: Runs the full TrueMission content pipeline: SERP research, intent and E-E-A-T gap analysis, GEO query fan-out and structure prescription, outline with real internal link discovery and conversion-point tagging, first draft, final polish with on-page SEO pack and schema, a standalone humanizer, and a conversion layer that injects site-branded WhatsApp CTAs and soft product upsells.
defaultPrompt: Add CTAs to this draft with $convert
